language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the interface language. Changes apply immediately.

general.title: General
general.description: Configure instance-wide preferences including log display, keyboard shortcuts, backup retention, and data sharing.

deployment.title: Deployment and auth
deployment.mode-local-trusted: Local trusted mode is optimized for a local operator. Browser requests run as local board context and no sign-in is required.
deployment.mode-public: Authenticated public mode requires sign-in for board access and is intended for public URLs.
deployment.mode-private: Authenticated private mode requires sign-in and is intended for LAN, VPN, or other private-network deployments.

censor-username.title: Censor username in logs
censor-username.description: Hide the username segment in home-directory paths and similar operator-visible log output. Standalone username mentions outside of paths are not yet masked in the live transcript view. This is off by default.

keyboard-shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
keyboard-shortcuts.description: Enable app keyboard shortcuts, including inbox navigation and global shortcuts like creating issues or toggling panels. This is off by default.

backup-retention.title: Backup retention
backup-retention.description: Configure how long automatic database backups are retained. Backups run roughly every hour and are compressed with gzip. Within the daily window all backups are kept; beyond that, one backup per week and one per month are preserved.

ai-feedback.title: AI feedback sharing
ai-feedback.description: Control whether thumbs up and thumbs down votes can send the voted AI output to Paperclip Labs. Votes are always saved locally.
ai-feedback.prompt-pending: No default is saved yet. The next thumbs up or thumbs down choice will ask once and then save the answer here.
ai-feedback.dont-allow-description: Keep voted AI outputs local only.
ai-feedback.retest-hint-prefix: To retest the first-use prompt in local dev, remove the
ai-feedback.retest-hint-or-set: JSON row for this instance, or set it back to
ai-feedback.retest-hint-end: both mean no default has been chosen yet.

sign-out.title: Sign out
sign-out.description: Sign out of this Paperclip instance. You will be redirected to the login page.

heartbeats.title: Scheduler Heartbeats
heartbeats.description: Agents with a timer heartbeat enabled across all of your companies.
heartbeats.empty: No scheduler heartbeats match the current criteria.

actions.confirm-disable-all: Disable timer heartbeats for all {{count}} enabled agents?
actions.confirm-disable-all_one: Disable timer heartbeats for {{count}} enabled agent?
actions.confirm-disable-all_other: Disable timer heartbeats for all {{count}} enabled agents?
actions.disable-failed: Failed to disable {{failures}} of {{total}} timer heartbeats. First error: {{detail}}
actions.disable-failed_other: Failed to disable {{failures}} of {{total}} timer heartbeats. First error: {{detail}}

experimental.title: Experimental
experimental.description: Opt into features that are still being evaluated before they become default behavior.

environments.title: Enable Environments
environments.description: Show environment management in company settings and allow project and agent environment assignment controls.

isolated-workspaces.title: Enable Isolated Workspaces
isolated-workspaces.description: Show execution workspace controls in project configuration and allow isolated workspace behavior for new and existing issue runs.

auto-restart-dev-server.title: Auto-Restart Dev Server When Idle
auto-restart-dev-server.description: In `pnpm dev:once`, wait for all queued and running local agent runs to finish, then restart the server automatically when backend changes or migrations make the current boot stale.

issue-graph-recovery.title: Auto-Create Issue Recovery Tasks
issue-graph-recovery.description: Let the heartbeat scheduler create recovery issues for issue dependency chains that have been stalled for at least 24 hours.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Control how your account appears in the sidebar and other board surfaces.
profile.name-help: Shown in the sidebar account footer and comment author surfaces.
profile.email-help: Email is managed by your auth session and is read-only here.
profile.upload-hint-with-company: Stored in Paperclip file storage for {{company}}.
profile.upload-hint-without-company: Select a company to upload an avatar into Paperclip storage.
profile.avatar-help: Click the avatar to upload a new image. {{hint}}
profile.select-company-first: Select a company before uploading a profile avatar.

claude-accounts.title: Claude Accounts
claude-accounts.description: Manage the pool of Claude Code accounts available to this company. Agents rotate across live accounts when one hits a 429 quota window.
claude-accounts.select-company: Select a company to manage Claude accounts.
claude-accounts.load-forbidden: You do not have permission to view Claude accounts for this company.

register.title: Register account
register.description-prefix: Reserve a slot in the pool. After saving, run
register.description-suffix: on the host machine to seed credentials.
register.label: Label
register.slug-title: Lowercase letters, digits, dashes; 1-63 chars; must start with a letter or digit
register.scope-shared: Shared with all companies (in shared mode)
register.success-body: Run `claude login` inside the slug directory to activate the new account.

list.title: Accounts
list.description: Round-robin pool sorted by last-used. Disabled accounts stay out of rotation.

costs.title: Cost summary
costs.description: Aggregated spend per Claude account for this company. Default range: since current month start.

history.title: Rotation history
history.description: Last 50 swap events emitted by the heartbeat. Strategy column reflects whether the resume worked or fell back to a full-context re-prompt.

company.title: Company Settings
company.no-company-selected: No company selected. Select a company from the switcher above.

general.name-hint: The display name for your company.
general.description-hint: Optional description shown in the company profile.

appearance.logo-hint: Upload a PNG, JPEG, WEBP, GIF, or SVG logo image.
appearance.brand-color-hint: Sets the hue for the company icon. Leave empty for auto-generated color.

environments.support-info: Environment choices use the same adapter support matrix as agent defaults. SSH is always available for remote-managed adapters, and sandbox environments appear only when a run-capable sandbox provider plugin is installed.
environments.empty: No environments saved for this company yet.
environments.field-name-hint: Operator-facing name for this execution target.
environments.field-description-hint: Optional note about what this machine is for.
environments.field-driver-hint: Local runs on this host. SSH stores a remote machine target. Sandbox stores plugin-backed provider config on the shared environment seam.
environments.field-host-hint: DNS name or IP address for the remote machine.
environments.field-remote-workspace-hint: Absolute path that Paperclip will verify during SSH connection tests.
environments.field-private-key-hint: Optional PEM private key. Leave blank to rely on the server's SSH agent or default keychain.
environments.field-known-hosts-hint: Optional known_hosts block used when strict host key checking is enabled.
environments.field-strict-host-key-hint: Keep this on unless you deliberately want probe-time host key acceptance disabled.
environments.field-provider-hint: Installed run-capable sandbox provider plugins appear here.
environments.no-config-fields: This provider does not declare additional configuration fields.

hiring.require-approval-label: Require board approval for new hires
hiring.require-approval-hint: New agent hires stay pending until approved by board.

claude-pool.description-prefix: Controls which Claude accounts agents in this company can rotate across.
claude-pool.per-company-explanation: keeps the pool isolated to this company's own accounts.
claude-pool.shared-explanation-prefix: additionally lets agents draw from accounts registered with
claude-pool.mode-shared-label: also draws from the shared pool

invites.generate-description: Generate an OpenClaw agent invite snippet.
invites.generate-tooltip: Creates a short-lived OpenClaw agent invite and renders a copy-ready prompt.

packages.description-prefix: Import and export have moved to dedicated pages accessible from the

danger-zone.description: Archive this company to hide it from the sidebar. This persists in the database.
danger-zone.archive-confirm: Archive company "{{name}}"? It will be hidden from the sidebar.

access.title: Company Access
access.description: Manage company user memberships, membership status, and explicit permission grants for {{name}}.
access.amber-banner: This account can manage access here through instance-admin privileges, but it does not currently hold an active company membership.
access.humans-description: Manage human company memberships, status, and grants here.
access.pending-joins-description: Review human join requests before they become active company members.
access.select-company: Select a company to manage access.
access.load-forbidden: You do not have permission to manage company members.

table.no-members: No user memberships found for this company yet.

edit-dialog.title: Edit member
edit-dialog.description: Update company role, membership status, and explicit grants for {{name}}.
edit-dialog.grants-description: Roles provide implicit grants automatically. Explicit grants below are only for overrides and extra access that should persist even if the role changes.
edit-dialog.no-role-implicit: No role is selected, so this member has no implicit grants right now.
edit-dialog.implicit-included-by: Included implicitly by the {{role}} role. Add an explicit grant only if it should stay after the role changes.

remove-dialog.title: Remove member
remove-dialog.description: Archive {{name}} and move active assignments before hiding this user from assignment fields.

companies.title: Companies
companies.delete-confirm: Delete this company and all its data? This cannot be undone.

org.title: Org Chart
org.select-company: Select a company to view org chart.
org.no-agents: No agents in the organization. Create agents to build your org chart.
org.select-company-chart: Select a company to view the org chart.

company-invites.title: Company Invites
company-invites.description: Create human invite links for company access. New invite links are copied to your clipboard when they are generated.
company-invites.select-company: Select a company to manage invites.
company-invites.load-forbidden: You do not have permission to manage company invites.
company-invites.create-description: Generate a human invite link and choose the default access it should request.
company-invites.single-use-note: Each invite link is single-use. The first successful use consumes the link and creates or reuses the matching join request before approval.
company-invites.history-note: Invite history below keeps the audit trail.
company-invites.url-note: This URL includes the current Paperclip domain returned by the server.
company-invites.history-description: Review invite status, role, inviter, and any linked join request.
company-invites.history-empty: No invites have been created for this company yet.
company-invites.clipboard-unavailable-body: Copy the invite URL manually from the field below.
company-invites.created-body-copied: Invite ready below and copied to clipboard.

role-options.viewer-description: Can view company work and follow along without operational permissions.
role-options.operator-description: Recommended for people who need to help run work without managing access.
role-options.admin-description: Recommended for operators who need to invite people, create agents, and approve joins.
role-options.admin-gets: Can create agents, invite users, assign tasks, and approve join requests.
role-options.owner-description: Full company access, including membership and permission management.
role-options.owner-gets: Everything in Admin, plus managing members and permission grants.

join-requests.title: Join Request Queue
join-requests.description: Review human and agent join requests outside the mixed inbox feed. This queue uses the same approval mutations as the inline inbox cards.
join-requests.select-company: Select a company to review join requests.
join-requests.load-forbidden: You do not have permission to review join requests for this company.
join-requests.no-results: No join requests match the current filters.

company-export.title: Export company
company-export.select-file: Select a file to preview its contents.
company-export.binary-preview-unavailable: Binary asset preview is not available for this file type.

company-import.title: Import company
company-import.select-company: Select a company to import into.
company-import.import-source-description: Choose a GitHub repo or upload a local Paperclip zip package.
company-import.local-zip-help: Upload a .zip exported directly from Paperclip. Re-zipped archives created by Finder, Explorer, or other zip tools may not import correctly.
company-import.github-url-hint: Repo tree path or blob URL to COMPANY.md (e.g. github.com/owner/repo/tree/main/company).
company-import.target-hint: Import into this company or create a new one.
company-import.new-name-hint: Optional override. Leave blank to use the package name.
company-import.collision-hint: Board imports can rename, skip, or replace matching company content.
company-import.select-file-preview: Select a file to preview its contents.
company-import.binary-preview-unavailable: Binary asset preview is not available for this file type.
company-import.no-files-error: No package files were found in the selected zip archive.

company-skills.title: Skills
company-skills.select-company: Select a company to manage skills.
company-skills.source-placeholder: Paste path, GitHub URL, or skills.sh command
company-skills.select-skill-message: Select a skill to inspect its files.
company-skills.remove-blocked-reason: Detach this skill from all agents before removing it.
company-skills.remove-skill-description: Remove this skill from the company library. If any agents still use it, removal will be blocked until it is detached.
company-skills.remove-confirm-fallback: You are about to remove this skill.
company-skills.detach-instruction: Detach this skill from all agents to enable removal.
company-skills.add-source-description: Paste a local path, GitHub URL, or `skills.sh` command into the field first.
company-skills.browse-skills-sh-hint: Find install commands and paste one here.
company-skills.search-github-hint: Look for repositories with `SKILL.md`, then paste the repo URL here.
company-skills.skill-created-body: {{name}} is now editable in the Paperclip workspace.
company-skills.skill-removed-body: {{name}} was removed from the company skill library.

costs.title: Costs
costs.description: Inference spend, platform fees, credits, and live quota windows.
costs.select-company: Select a company to view costs.
costs.select-date-range: Select a start and end date to load data.
costs.inference-ledger-description: Request-scoped inference spend for the selected period.
costs.budget-utilization-text: {{percent}}% of monthly budget consumed in this range.
costs.by-agent-description: What each agent consumed in the selected period.
costs.by-project-description: Run costs attributed through project-linked issues.
costs.no-finance-events: No finance events yet. Add account-level charges once biller invoices or credits land.
costs.finance-summary-description: Account-level charges that do not map to a single inference request.
costs.metric-net-subtitle: Debit minus credit for the selected period
costs.metric-estimated-subtitle: Estimated debits that are not yet invoice-authoritative
costs.budget-control-plane-description: Hard-stop spend limits for agents and projects. Provider subscription quota stays separate and appears under Providers.
costs.metric-active-incidents-subtitle: Open soft or hard threshold crossings
costs.metric-pending-approvals-subtitle: Budget override approvals awaiting board action
costs.active-incidents-description: Resolve hard stops here by raising the budget or explicitly keeping the scope paused.
costs.agent-budgets-description: Recurring monthly spend policies for individual agents.
costs.project-budgets-description: Lifetime spend policies for execution-bound projects.
costs.no-budget-policies: No budget policies yet. Set agent and project budgets from their detail pages, or use the existing company monthly budget control.
costs.no-cost-events-period: No cost events in this period.
costs.no-billable-events-period: No billable events in this period.
costs.by-biller-description: Account-level financial events grouped by who charged or credited them.
